abilities.effect: You ring a blasting note on the bell that sends shock waves through the air. The blast deals 4d6 sonic damage to each creature in a 15-foot emanation (DC 22 basic Fortitude save). On a failure, the target is also deafened for 1 round.
abilities.name: Activate

traits.name: Manipulate
traits.text: You must physically manipulate an item or make gestures to use an action with this trait. Creatures without a suitable appendage can’t perform actions with this trait. Manipulate actions often trigger reactions.

traits.name: Sonic
traits.text: An effect with the sonic trait functions only if it makes sound, meaning it has no effect in an area of silence or in a vacuum. This is different from an auditory spell, which is effective only if the target can hear it. A sonic effect might deal sonic damage.

stat_block.text: This large bronze bell has a fine ash handle, and the clapper is made of blackened iron. It grants you a +1 item bonus to Performance checks while playing music with the instrument.

traits.name: Magical
traits.text: Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.
